description_long: This is a large, modern suburban house with a flat roof and a spacious driveway leading to a double garage. The front facade features a prominent entryway with a covered porch, flanked by manicured shrubs and a small garden. Multiple rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged across the two stories, providing ample natural light. The property is surrounded by a variety of trees and landscaped greenery, enhancing its curb appeal. The rear and side views reveal additional windows and a clean, geometric architectural style. The overall design emphasizes functionality, openness, and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A large, modern two-story house with a flat roof, double garage, and landscaped gardens, featuring symmetrical windows and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, double garage, driveway, and landscaped garden with several trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the driveway, side windows, and additional landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, flat roof, and more windows, with trees framing the property.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the garage, driveway, and a mix of front and side landscaping elements.
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent covered entryway with steps, flanked by shrubs and a small garden, featuring a modern door and minimal decorative elements.
